app.title: PdfEditor

app.passwordPrompt: Enter the password to view this PDF

sidebar.dropHere: Drop PDF here or click to upload

mergeDialog.description: Select at least 2 PDFs to merge.

removeDialog.title: Remove Pages
removeDialog.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove the selected pages? This will create a new PDF file.

protectDialog.title: Protect PDF with Password
protectDialog.securityNote: Passwords cannot be recovered. Store it securely.
protectDialog.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters

bugReport.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what happened and how to reproduce it
bugReport.sentDescription: Your bug report has been submitted successfully.
bugReport.searchPrompt: Search for existing bugs before reporting a new one:
bugReport.noResults: No existing bugs found. You can create a new report below.

auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

auth.resetSent: If the email exists, the reset request has been received.

deleteModal.title: Delete PDF
deleteModal.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete
deleteModal.warning: This action cannot be undone. The file will be permanently deleted.

hero.title: Your PDF editor
hero.subtitle: simple, fast, offline
hero.description: Merge, split, reorder and edit your PDFs directly from your browser. Free, secure and ad-free.

features.title: Everything you need
features.description: Professional tools to manage your PDFs without installing anything.

merge.title: Merge PDFs
merge.description: Combine multiple documents into a single file. Drag and drop in the order you prefer.

split.title: Split PDFs
split.description: Extract specific pages or ranges. Create a new one with just what you need.

reorder.title: Reorder Pages
reorder.description: Move, reorganize and arrange pages with intuitive drag & drop.

edittext.title: Edit Text
edittext.description: Correct or update text directly in the PDF. Like a word processor.

unlock.title: Unlock PDFs
unlock.description: Remove protection from password-protected PDFs (with permission).

metadata.title: Metadata & Info
metadata.description: View and edit title, author, subject and keywords of your PDFs.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: Three simple steps to edit your PDFs.

step1.title: Upload your PDF
step1.description: Drag the file into the upload area or select it from your device.

step2.title: Edit
step2.description: Merge, split, reorder, edit text or update metadata.

step3.title: Download the result
step3.description: Download the edited PDF. Your files are never shared.

pricing.title: Simple and transparent pricing
pricing.description: Start free, upgrade when you need more.

cta.title: Ready to simplify your PDFs?
cta.description: No complicated registration. Get started free in 30 seconds.

footer.brand: Edit your PDFs easily, quickly and securely. Directly from your browser.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At PdfEditor, accessible from pdfeditor.app, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Privacy Policy document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by PdfEditor and how we use it. If you have additional questions or require more information about our Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact us.

infoWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
infoWeCollect.description: The personal information that you are asked to provide, and the reasons why you are asked to provide it, will be made clear to you at the point we ask you to provide your personal information.
infoWeCollect.item1: Account information: email address and full name (when you register)
infoWeCollect.item2: PDF files you upload for editing — stored temporarily and automatically deleted after your session
infoWeCollect.item3: Usage data: pages visited, features used (anonymized for analytics)
infoWeCollect.item4: Technical data: browser type and version, device type, operating system

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.description: We use the information we collect in various ways, including to:
howWeUse.item1: Provide, operate, and maintain our PDF editing service
howWeUse.item2: Improve, personalize, and expand our service
howWeUse.item3: Communicate with you, including for customer service and support
howWeUse.item4: Find and prevent fraud, abuse, and security incidents

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis for Processing (GDPR)
legalBasis.description: If you are from the European Economic Area, our legal basis for collecting and using the personal information described in this Privacy Policy depends on the information we collect and the context in which we collect it. We may process your personal data because: we need to perform a contract with you, you have given us permission to do so, the processing is in our legitimate interests, or we need to comply with the law.

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.description: We will retain your personal information only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. PDF files are automatically deleted after processing or shortly after your session ends. Account information is retained until you request deletion of your account.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing and Disclosure
dataSharing.description: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information only when required by law, to protect our rights, or with your explicit consent. PDF files are processed on our Render cloud servers and are not accessible to other users.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.description: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information, including encryption in transit via HTTPS, secure storage, and regular security audits. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

yourRights.title: Your Data Protection Rights (GDPR/CCPA)
yourRights.description: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following data protection rights:
yourRights.item1: The right to access — request copies of your personal data
yourRights.item2: The right to rectification — request correction of inaccurate data
yourRights.item3: The right to erasure — request deletion of your personal data
yourRights.item4: The right to restrict processing — request limitation of how we use your data
yourRights.item5: The right to data portability — request transfer of your data to another organization

cookiesSection.title: Cookies
cookiesSection.description: We use essential cookies for authentication and security purposes. We do not use tracking cookies or third-party analytics cookies. By using PdfEditor, you consent to the use of essential cookies necessary for the service to function. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.

changes.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.description: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the 'Last updated' date. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: privacy@pdfeditor.app

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content: By using PdfEditor, you agree to these terms. You are responsible for the content of the PDFs you upload. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate applicable laws. This service is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and security. We do not use tracking cookies or third-party analytics. By using PdfEditor, you consent to the use of essential cookies necessary for the service to function.

status.title: Service Status
status.content: All systems operational. For real-time status updates, check our GitHub repository or contact support.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.content: Documentation is available on our GitHub repository. Visit github.com/mirkobechini/pdfEditor for setup guides, API references, and contribution guidelines.

guide.title: User Guide
guide.content: Upload a PDF, select an operation (merge, split, reorder, edit text), and download the result. For detailed instructions, visit our GitHub repository.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.content: Q: Is my data secure? A: Yes, all files are encrypted in transit and automatically deleted after processing. Q: What formats are supported? A: PDF, TXT import, and export to PDF, PNG, JPG, TXT. Q: Is there a file size limit? A: Up to 50MB per file.

api.title: API Reference
api.content: The PdfEditor API is available for programmatic access. Visit our GitHub repository for API documentation, endpoints, and authentication details.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.content: Upcoming features include: PDF compression, inline text editor, desktop app (Tauri v2), cloud sync, mobile app, and AI-powered PDF editing. See our GitHub repository for the full roadmap.
